name: panabit-tang-r1
description: OctoBus package for Panabit TANG-R1 login, IP table, block, and unblock APIs.

Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/Login.name: login
Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/Login.description: Login to Panabit TANG-R1 and return an API token.

Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/ListIPTa.name: list-iptable
Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/ListIPTa.description: List Panabit IP table address groups.

Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/AddIPTab.name: add-iptable
Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/AddIPTab.description: Create a Panabit IP table address group.

Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/BlockIP.name: block-ip
Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/BlockIP.description: Add an IP address to a Panabit IP table.

Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/UnblockI.name: unblock-ip
Panabit_TANG_R1.Panabit_TANG_R1/UnblockI.description: Remove an IP address from a Panabit IP table.
